Man accused of driving wife to suicide developed software to track her, jury toldChristopher Trybus is on trial for manslaughter after his wife Tarryn Baird took her own life. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70zneyjpwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70zneyjpwo#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 14:33:46 GMT
